summary_markdown:
# V3-EXQ-018 — ARC-016 Dynamic Precision Commitment Test

**Status:** FAIL
**Training:** 200 eps (stable env, drift_interval=10, drift_prob=0.1)
**Eval stable:** 50 eps | **Eval perturbed:** 50 eps
**Recovery:** 30 eps
**Seed:** 0

## Motivation (ARC-016)

V2 EXQ-025 FAILED because precision was externally imposed. V3 derives precision
from E3's own prediction error EMA (running_variance). At each step:
  z_world_predicted = E2.world_forward(z_world_t, a_t)
  prediction_error  = z_world_{t+1} - z_world_predicted
  agent.e3.update_running_variance(prediction_error)

  precision     = 1 / (running_variance + ε)
  commit_threshold = 0.7 + 0.3 * min(1, running_variance)
  committed = precision > commit_threshold

## Phase Results

| Phase | mean_var | mean_precision | commit_rate | n_decisions |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Training (stable) | 0.0074 | 179.024 | 1.000 | 546 |
| Eval stable | 0.0053 | 187.952 | 1.000 | 135 |
| Eval perturbed | 0.0053 | 188.189 | 1.000 | 127 |
| Recovery | 0.0053 | 187.824 | 1.000 | 72 |

**Key differences:**
- running_variance: perturbed - stable = -0.0000
- precision: stable - perturbed = -0.2362
- commit_rate: stable - perturbed = 0.0000

## PASS Criteria

| Criterion | Result | Value |
|---|---|---|
| C1: var_diff > 0.02 (variance diverges) | FAIL | -0.0000 |
| C2: precision_stable > precision_perturbed | FAIL | -0.2362 |
| C3: commit_rate_stable > commit_rate_perturbed | FAIL | 0.0000 |
| C4: n_stable_decisions >= 20 | PASS | 135 |
| C5: No fatal errors | PASS | 0 |

Criteria met: 2/5 → **FAIL**

## Failure Notes

- C1 FAIL: running_variance perturbed-stable diff=-0.0000 <= 0.02 [perturbed=0.0053 stable=0.0053]
- C2 FAIL: precision_stable=187.952 <= precision_perturbed=188.189
- C3 FAIL: commit_rate_stable=1.000 <= commit_rate_perturbed=1.000
